title: Brute Force: Failed Logon Spike per Account
description: Detects Event 4625 failed logon spikes — 5+ failures for a single account indicates password spraying or brute force. Uses the real GOAD AD lab failed authentication data.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4625' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), SrcIP = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'IpAddress:([^;]+)'), FailReason = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'Status:(0x[0-9a-fA-F]+)') | stats count as Failures, distinctcount(SrcIP) as UniqueSources by Account, Entity | where Failures > 3 | sort -Failures
falsepositives: Users with expired or forgotten passwords
